task.title: Write tests for symlink mount and tar seeder

events.content: Added direct filesystem and tar import tests for the new seeding modules: Added direct filesystem and tar import tests for the new seeding modules

raw.question: Added direct filesystem and tar import tests for the new seeding modules
raw.chosen: Added direct filesystem and tar import tests for the new seeding modules
raw.reasoning: These modules have filesystem-heavy behavior and fallback branches that are best covered with temp directories and mocked HTTP boundaries

retrospective.summary: Added Vitest coverage for createSymlinkMount and seedWorkspaceTar, including permissions, sync-back behavior, tar import, exclude handling, and fallback/error paths
